error_signature: PGRST205: Could not find the table 'public.X' in the schema cache
title: Supabase plugin not listing all tables due to branch mismatch
symptom: The Supabase plugin in WeWeb only lists a limited number of tables, and fetching any missing table results in a PGRST205 error.
not_this_if: All tables are visible in the correct branch
root_cause: WeWeb was configured to connect to a Supabase branch that did not have the latest table updates. This caused the plugin to fail in recognizing tables that existed in the main branch but not in the test branch.
fix_steps: Check which Supabase branch WeWeb is connected to
Switch the connection to the correct branch (main) that has all the tables
Refresh the Supabase plugin in WeWeb
agent_instruction: Ensure WeWeb is connected to the correct Supabase branch that contains all necessary tables.
